steps.title: Set up the total charge function
steps.content:
The first 25 people cost $25 \times 22 = 550$ dollars. For $n$ people total, there are $(n - 25)$ additional people at 14 dollars each. The total charge is:
$$f(n) = 550 + 14(n - 25)$$

steps.title: Simplify to find the function
steps.content:
Expand and combine like terms:
$$f(n) = 550 + 14n - 350 = 14n + 200$$
That matches choice A — A is correct.
